title: Senior Staff Engineer | AI Voice Engineering
description:
Join us in bringing joy to customer experience.  Five9 is a
leading provider of cloud contact center software, bringing
the power of cloud innovation to customers worldwide.

Living our values everyday results in our team-first culture
and enables us to innovate, grow, and thrive while enjoying
the journey together. We celebrate diversity and foster an
inclusive environment, empowering our employees to be their
authentic selves.

About the Role

We are looking for a Senior Staff Engineer, AI Voice
Engineering, who will be responsible for the software
architecture and software development of Five9’s AI Agent
voice orchestration software platform. This platform handles
real-time streaming voice, including RTP/SIP, integration
with speech recognition engines, speech synthesis engines,
end of turn model execution and interruption model
inference. As a senior individual contributor, you’ll not
only be one of the most senior developers on the team,
you’ll also mentor junior engineers and set technology
direction for platform. You’ll work with other teams,
collaborating cross-functionally to make sure complete
solutions are delivered. You’ll make some of the most
important technology decisions and be in the driver’s seat
for the platform evolution. You’ll also get your hands dirty
working direcdtly on the software, diagnosing issues, and
helping uplevel the team to reach the highest levels of
performance. Your responsibility extends through deployment
and operations (we practice devops), and you will ensure the
software platform is low latency, scalable, reliable,
observable and maintainable by Five9.

What You’ll Do

- Lead architecture and development of real-time AI voice
  systems
- Design and optimize low-latency voice pipelines using
  RTP/SIP
- Integrate ASR, TTS, and AI inference services
- Mentor engineers and lead technical best practices
- Collaborate with Product, AI, Infrastructure, and SRE teams
- Own the full lifecycle: design, development, deployment, and
  operations
- Ensure scalability, reliability, and observability

Required Qualifications

- 10+ years of overall software development experience
- 5+ years building real-time voice systems in C++
- 1+ year experience with real-time GenAI voice platforms
- Bachelor’s or higher degree in Computer Science or related
  field

Technical Skills

Modern C++ (C++17+), RTP/SIP, audio codecs, SIP/SDP, ASR/TTS
integration, AI APIs, cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP),
CI/CD, containers, SRE principles

Leadership & Impact

Lead architecture for mission-critical systems Mentor
engineers and influence platform-wide decisions Balance
latency, quality, cost, and reliability trade-offs

Five9 embraces diversity and is committed to building a team
that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and
skills.  The more inclusive we are, the better we are. 
Five9 is an equal opportunity employer.

View our privacy policy, including our privacy notice to
California residents here: https://www.five9.com/pt-
pt/legal.

Note: Five9 will never request that an applicant send money
as a prerequisite for commencing employment with Five9.
responsibilities: Lead architecture and development of real-time AI voice orchestration systems
Design and optimize low-latency voice pipelines using RTP/SIP protocols
Integrate speech recognition (ASR), speech synthesis (TTS), and AI inference services
Execute end of turn models and interruption model inference in real-time
Mentor junior engineers and establish technical best practices
Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, AI, Infrastructure, and SRE teams
Own full software lifecycle including deployment and operations with DevOps practices
Ensure platform scalability, reliability, observability, and maintainability
use_cases: Real-time AI voice agent orchestration for contact centers
Low-latency streaming voice processing and handling
Speech-to-text and text-to-speech integration for AI conversations
AI inference for conversational turn detection and interruption handling
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building and deploying real-time AI voice
orchestration systems that directly integrate and execute AI
inference services, ASR, TTS, and end-of-turn models. The
engineer works hands-on with GenAI voice platforms and AI
inference, not just supporting infrastructure.
